depilation.heroSubtitle: Premium depilation with 14 years of expertise. Medical precision meets comfort.
depilation.viewPricesAndBook: View full price list and book your appointment.
depilation.aboutIntro: I'm Natalie Volik — a premium depilation specialist with 14 years of professional experience and medical education. Welcome to V Studio in Bratislava.
depilation.aboutJourney: My career began in Kyiv, where I set the highest standards for quality, safety, and client care. Today I continue my practice in Bratislava, bringing the same precision and warmth to every session.
depilation.aboutExpertise: I master every depilation technique offered in the studio. Each method is selected individually — based on your skin type, hair structure, and sensitivity level.
depilation.aboutMedical: My medical background means I understand skin physiology at a clinical level. Every procedure is performed with maximum precision, safety, and gentleness.
depilation.aboutContinuous: I continuously advance my skills through professional trainings, conferences, and industry exhibitions — ensuring you always receive the most effective, modern techniques available.
depilation.philosophyQuote: For me, depilation is not just a procedure. It's confidence, aesthetics, and a sense of being well-groomed.
depilation.achievement2: Technologist & educator for Terra, Enova, Biolaif
depilation.achievement4: Speaker at professional conferences and training marathons
depilation.achievement5: Participant in international beauty industry exhibitions

process.title: How Your Visit Works
process.subtitle: From the first step to lasting smoothness — simple, comfortable, and professional.

consultation.title: Consultation
consultation.desc: We discuss your goals, skin type, and select the ideal technique together.

preparation.title: Preparation
preparation.desc: Skin is gently cleansed and prepared. Sterile, single-use tools are opened in front of you.

procedure.title: Procedure
procedure.desc: The technique is performed with precision and care. I work at your comfort pace.

aftercare.title: Aftercare
aftercare.desc: You receive personal aftercare recommendations for the best, longest-lasting result.

process.expectation: Most clients describe the sensation as a brief, tolerable warmth. First sessions may be more sensitive — each subsequent visit becomes easier as hair grows thinner. Results typically last 3–5 weeks depending on the zone and technique.

team.title: Your Specialist
team.subtitle: Every procedure is performed personally by a certified professional.

natalie.name: Natalie Volik
natalie.bio: 14 years of experience. Medical education. Champion of Ukraine in depilation. Certified technologist for Terra, Enova, and Biolaif. I treat every client as the only one.

workspace.title: Our Studio
workspace.desc: A calm, private space designed for your comfort. Every detail — from lighting to temperature — is carefully considered to make your experience as relaxing as possible.

hygiene.title: Safety & Hygiene
hygiene.subtitle: Your health is non-negotiable. Every detail is controlled.

singleUse.title: Single-Use Tools
singleUse.desc: All applicators, spatulas, and contact materials are opened from sealed packaging in front of you and disposed of immediately after use.

sanitization.title: Medical-Grade Sanitization
sanitization.desc: Surfaces and equipment are disinfected with hospital-grade antiseptics between every client. No exceptions.

sterilization.title: Autoclave Sterilization
sterilization.desc: All reusable instruments undergo autoclave sterilization at 134°C — the same standard used in medical facilities.

certified.title: Certified Materials
certified.desc: We work exclusively with certified professional brands: Terra, Enova, Biolaif. All products are dermatologically tested and hypoallergenic.

review1.text: I was terrified of bikini depilation. Natalie made me feel completely at ease — zero awkwardness, minimal pain, perfect result. I've been coming back for 2 years.
review1.author: Maria K.

review2.text: The most hygienic salon I've ever visited. Everything opened in front of me, everything explained. I felt safe from the first minute.
review2.author: Elena S.

review3.text: I switched from another salon after one visit here. The difference in quality and gentleness is night and day. Natalie truly knows skin.
review3.author: Katarina P.

review4.text: As a man, I was hesitant. But the professionalism and discretion here are absolute. Highly recommend for everyone.
review4.author: Andrej M.

review5.text: My electroepilation results are incredible. Small sessions, big difference. Finally dealing with those stubborn facial hairs.
review5.author: Oksana D.

review6.text: I booked online and received a confirmation instantly. The process from booking to aftercare is seamless and professional.
review6.author: Lucia T.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before your first visit.

painful.a: Most clients describe it as a brief, tolerable warmth. I use techniques that minimize discomfort, and the sensation decreases with each subsequent session as hair becomes finer. If you're sensitive, I'll adapt the approach specifically for you.

prepare.q: How should I prepare for my appointment?
prepare.a: Hair should be 3–5 mm long (about 10–14 days of growth). Avoid sunbathing, tanning beds, and exfoliating 24 hours before. No creams or lotions on the day of the procedure. That's it — I'll take care of the rest.

results.a: Depending on the technique and body zone, results last 3–5 weeks. With regular sessions, hair grows thinner and slower over time. Laser epilation provides long-term reduction after a course of sessions.

technique.q: Which technique is best for me?
technique.a: It depends on your skin type, hair structure, and sensitivity. During the first visit, I'll assess your needs and recommend the most effective method. I'm certified in all five techniques — sugaring, wax, bio, laser, and electroepilation.

men.a: Absolutely. I work with both women and men, ensuring full tact, confidentiality, and professionalism. All services are available regardless of gender.

aftercare.a: Avoid hot baths, saunas, direct sun, and tight clothing for 24–48 hours. I'll give you a personalized aftercare card after every session with specific recommendations for your skin type.

booking.q: How do I book and can I cancel?
booking.a: Book online through this website — select a service, date, and time. You'll receive an instant email confirmation. Need to reschedule? Just contact me at least 24 hours in advance.

sensitive.q: Is it safe for sensitive skin or allergies?
sensitive.a: Yes. My medical education allows me to work safely with all skin types, including sensitive and allergy-prone skin. All materials are dermatologically tested and hypoallergenic. I always do a patch test if there's any concern.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: Questions? Prefer to talk? I'm here for you.
contact.messagePlaceholder: Tell me about your needs or ask any question...
contact.success: Thank you! I'll get back to you within 24 hours.

depilation.serviceWaxDesc: Classic warm or hot wax for longer-lasting smoothness. Suitable for all skin types.
depilation.serviceBioDesc: Premium natural formulas. Maximum care for your skin with professional brands.

footer.tagline: Premium depilation studio in Bratislava. 14 years of expertise, medical precision, absolute care.

myServices.laserDesc: Long-term hair reduction with laser technology. Face, body, bikini, legs — professional equipment.
